{{Infobox technique
| name = Consume
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

''See also: [[Consume Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The Consume technique is a hunger-based method used to absorb power, energy, and various materials from other sources. It serves as a highly efficient shortcut for advancement, allowing a user to bypass the need for traditional resources by instead feeding on enemies. The technique is described as a straightforward application of [[hunger madra]] that functions similarly to a fire designed for burning, possessing nearly limitless applications. When utilized, the technique can drain [[aura]], [[madra]], [[soulfire]], willpower, authority, and even physical objects or constructs. It can be used to replenish a user's own energy or to steal power from opponents during combat. Beyond mere energy absorption, the technique can also allow a user to gain wisdom and experience from those they devour. While it provides rapid growth, the process can be addictive and may result in physical aftereffects or intense psychological urges to satisfy a growing hunger. The technique can be adapted by the user and has been used to consume everything from [[sacred beasts]] and spirits to massive entities like [[Dreadgods]] and [[Titans]].}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The Consume technique is a method that allows a user to bypass the need for traditional advancement resources by converting enemies into spiritual elixirs. [[Lindon]] identifies this technique as a potential way to feed [[Dross]] and hopes to successfully implement its principles into his own development. Once integrated into his arm, the technique functions as a way for [[Lindon]] to steal power from others. He eventually utilizes this ability to suck the strength away from the [[Remnant]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Consume]] technique allows a user to no longer need advancement resources by using enemies instead.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7">''Wintersteel'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Consume]] is a technique [[Lindon]] could master to feed [[Dross]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8">''Wintersteel'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The principles of the original [[Consume]] technique help [[Lindon]]'s development process.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c9">''Wintersteel'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Consume]] is a technique [[Lindon]] hopes to get working.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Consume]] technique allows [[Lindon]] to turn enemies into spiritual elixirs.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c10">''Wintersteel'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] has a [[Consume]] technique that allows him to steal power.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c13">''Wintersteel'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Consume]] is a technique used by [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c18">''Wintersteel'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Consume]] technique is in [[Lindon]]'s arm.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c23">''Wintersteel'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] used the [[Consume]] technique to suck away strength from the [[Remnant]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27">''Wintersteel'', chapter 27</ref>}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] uses the [[Consume]] technique on the [[Wandering Titan]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c20">''Bloodline'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] attempted to use his [[Consume]] technique on [[Reigan Shen]]'s attack.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c16">''Reaper'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Consume]] technique is a basic use of [[hunger madra]] that acts like a fire binding to burn things.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c20">''Reaper'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] began to [[Consume]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c7">''Dreadgod'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|As a basic technique, Consume was first utilized by [[Lindon]] at the beginning of his journey. This method is associated with [[Northstrider]] and can be employed to weaken a [[dragon]]'s breath, such as when [[Lindon]] began consuming scales from a [[dragon]]'s lip. The technique also serves to retrieve memories from within the [[labyrinth]]. Furthermore, [[Lindon]] used Consume to maintain his energy levels by absorbing the attacks of his enemies.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] used the [[Consume]] technique when he first started.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c3">''Waybound'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Consume]] is a technique associated with [[Northstrider]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c12">''Waybound'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] began to [[Consume]] scales from the [[dragon]]'s lip.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c19">''Waybound'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Consume]] technique can be used to weaken the [[dragon]]'s breath.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Consume]] is a technique used to retrieve memories from the [[labyrinth]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c24">''Waybound'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] kept his energy up by [[Consuming]] the attacks from his enemies.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c28">''Waybound'', chapter 28</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Consume]] is a basic technique.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c30">''Waybound'', chapter 30</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
